text: Standing in front of this glowing, high-tech room makes me feel a mix of curiosity and vulnerability. I notice the "R + D" on the wall, inviting thoughts of innovation and exploration. Yet, the words on the screen echo a certain exposure and uncertainty within me, questioning whether my intentions are comprehended or misconstrued. The illuminated surroundings accentuate my sense of self-awareness, as if I am both participant and subject of observation, prompting reflection on perception and the misunderstood spaces between intention and reception.
